ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level achieved by the customer */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Current job title of the customer */,
  "default" TEXT /* Indicates if the customer has defaulted on a loan */,
  "housing" TEXT /* Indicates if the customer has a housing loan */,
  "loan" TEXT /* Indicates if the customer has an active loan */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "employment_length" INTEGER /* Length of employment in years */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign ended */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign */,
  "target_segment" TEXT /* Targeted customer segment */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being evaluated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., conversion rate, engagement) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact method */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the contact method */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact method (e.g., cellular, telephone) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Actual contact value (e.g., phone number) */,
  "contact_preference" TEXT /* Indicates the customer's preferred contact method */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the contact information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_contacts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., call, email) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the interaction (e.g., issue resolved, escalated) */,
  "customer_satisfaction" TEXT /* Customer satisfaction rating (e.g., satisfied, dissatisfied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "merchant" TEXT /* Merchant involved in the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_contacts" (
  "contact_campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign contact */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer targeted in the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "contact_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer was contacted */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Method used to contact the customer */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the campaign contact (e.g., conversion, no response) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_contacts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_contacts_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer for whom the prediction is made */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., credit risk, campaign response) */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the system user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the system user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segment_membership" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_membership_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES campaign_segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segment_membership_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_segment_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being evaluated */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment being evaluated */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., conversion rate, engagement) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_segment_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_segment_performance_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES campaign_segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., data update, login) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "affected_data" TEXT /* Description of the affected data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
